text:
## Assessment: APPROVED

All eight acceptance criteria pass. The revision adds hard-coded IEEE-754 vectors that freeze Uniform, Box–Muller branch/counter ordering, PRD-0003 coordinate mapping, and LogNormal transformation behavior.

```json
{"assessment":"APPROVED","blockingIssues":[],"summary":"All PRD 0013 requirements pass; fixed to_bits vectors now freeze Uniform, Box-Muller coordinate/branch ordering, and LogNormal transformation behavior in addition to the statistical, CLI, reproducibility, CRN, pinning, scale, quantile, and documentation coverage."}
```
